quiz.question: What is the purpose of the __init__ method in a class?
Which keyword is used to access attributes inside a class?
Which naming style indicates a private attribute?
What does inheritance allow a class to do?
options: Reuse attributes and methods from another class
Hide all attributes from other classes
quiz.answer: Reuse attributes and methods from another class

quiz.question: Which examples show polymorphism?
options: Different classes defining their own speak() method
Using super() to call a parent constructor
Two variables storing the same value
A subclass overriding a parent method
A class with only one method
answer: Different classes defining their own speak() method
A subclass overriding a parent method
